products.name: Balancing Foam Face Wash

concerns: sensitive to greasy or thick formulas

products.description: A lightweight foaming cleanser that helps control excess oil while maintaining clarity. Leaves skin feeling fresh without tightness.
products.how_to_use: Dispense one to two pumps onto wet hands, lather and massage over face, then rinse thoroughly.

products.name: Pore Refining Toner

concerns: sensitive to greasy or thick formulas

products.description: A refreshing toner that helps minimise the appearance of pores and shine. Preps the skin for serums and gels.
products.how_to_use: After cleansing, apply with a cotton pad or hands, gently press into skin and avoid eye area.

products.name: Brightening Exfoliating Serum
products.description: A leave-on exfoliating serum that gently resurfaces dull skin. Promotes a more even tone and refined texture over time.
products.how_to_use: Use at night, two to three times a week on dry skin after cleansing, avoid eye area and always follow with sunscreen next day.

products.name: HydraBoost Hyaluronic Serum
products.description: A powerful hydrating serum that plumps and smooths the skin's surface. Ideal as a daily moisture booster under any cream.
products.how_to_use: Apply 2–3 drops to slightly damp face after cleansing and toning, then seal with moisturiser.

products.name: Revive Peptide Eye Serum
products.description: A lightweight eye serum that targets fine lines and dullness. Helps keep the under-eye area smooth and hydrated.
products.how_to_use: Use a rice-grain amount around the eye contour morning and night, gently tap until absorbed.

products.name: Lightweight Gel Moisturiser

concerns: sensitive to greasy or thick formulas
Dryness, dehydration, and maintaining the skin's moisture barrier

products.description: An ultra-light gel moisturiser that gives a burst of hydration without heaviness. Perfect under makeup in humid weather.
products.how_to_use: Use twice daily after toner and serum, apply a pea-sized amount over face.

products.name: Clarifying Night Gel for Oily Skin

concerns: sensitive to greasy or thick formulas

products.description: A cooling night gel that refines texture and reduces the look of enlarged pores. Designed to feel weightless on oilier skin.
products.how_to_use: Use at night on cleansed skin, apply a thin layer and avoid eye area. Follow with spot treatments if needed.

products.name: Daily Defense Sunscreen Fluid SPF 50

concerns: sensitive to greasy or thick formulas

products.description: A lightweight high-protection sunscreen fluid that feels comfortable on oily skin. Helps prevent sunburn and future pigmentation.
products.how_to_use: Use as the last step of your morning routine, apply generously 15 minutes before sun exposure and reapply every 2–3 hours.
